code:
%%{Education_StudentDB}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (Education_StudentDB)

[Education_GradeSync] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (Education_LMS_Portal)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (Education_ClassroomService)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (Education_LMS_Portal)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [Education_GradeSync]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [Education_LMS_Portal] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Education_StudentDB设计一个Hub同步状态机。核心场景是：当本地hub检测到与federation的状态分歧时，如何完成一次完整的同步闭环。我设想从OUT_OF_SYNC状态开始，经过拉取、合并、验证，最终回到SYNCED。
明白了。分歧检测的具体触发条件有哪些？另外，FETCH_REMOTE这个阶段是从哪些远端节点拉取数据？
触发条件我想到三类：CRDT frame过期、缺失contributions或metrics、网络拓扑变更。拉取来源主要是Education_ClassroomService这类federation peers。拉取完成后进入MERGE状态，这里要做CRDT合并和确定性冲突解决。
好的，我已经把主链路画出来了：OUT_OF_SYNC → FETCH_REMOTE → MERGE。接下来验证阶段需要检查哪些内容？
VALIDATE阶段要跑schema和hash完整性检查，还要验证contribution和governance的delta，关键是verify signatures from remote hubs。通过后进入SYNCED，通知Education_LMS_Portal同步完成。
异常路径我也补充一下：FETCH_REMOTE可能因NetworkTimeout或AuthError失败，MERGE可能遇到ConflictUnresolved，VALIDATE可能HashMismatch。这些失败都汇聚到FAILED状态，然后进入RETRY重新调度。
对的，RETRY之后回到OUT_OF_SYNC重新走流程。另外还需要一条维护路径：SYNCED状态下如果触发PeriodicSync或参数变更，也要回到OUT_OF_SYNC。
最后一种边缘情况：如果HubOffline或者延迟过高，是否需要DEGRADED状态？然后escalate到Education_LMS_Portal的运维侧？
完全正确，DEGRADED作为OUT_OF_SYNC的异常分支，最终escalate到ops。整个状态机覆盖了正常同步、失败重试、运维降级三种模式。
状态机已完成，包含8个核心状态：OUT_OF_SYNC、FETCH_REMOTE、MERGE、VALIDATE、SYNCED、FAILED、RETRY、DEGRADED。所有状态都用core样式高亮，transition标注了触发事件和涉及的教育系统组件。
